creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 199539
patch to update graphics/qgis from 2.18.17 to 2.18.26

Minor update from QGIS 2.18.17 to 2.18.26.


Changes of the port:
- Update to 2.18.26
- Change LIB_DEPENDS from qwt5 to qwt6
- Reorder CMAKE_ARGS
- Adapt QWT_INCLUDE_DIR and QWT_LIBRARY after PyQt changes
- Update GRASS7 dependency from 7.2.2 to 7.4.0
- Update several Python dependencies
- Remove INSTALLS_ICONS, not needed here
- Update pkg-plist


The patch was tested on Poudriere (11.2i/a, 12.0RC1i/a and, HEADi/a),
'portlint -AC' seems happy.
